scripts.deploy: echo 'BLOCKED on techdebt/vp-lemmascript-migration: prod deploy disabled during migration. Use: bun run deploy:staging' && exit 1
scripts.deploy:assets: echo 'BLOCKED on techdebt/vp-lemmascript-migration: prod deploy disabled during migration. Use: bun run deploy:staging' && exit 1
scripts.deploy:search: echo 'BLOCKED on techdebt/vp-lemmascript-migration: prod deploy disabled during migration. Use: bun run deploy:staging' && exit 1
scripts.deploy:staging: bun run build:cache-version && bun run build:views && bun run build:assets && bun run build:search && npx wrangler deploy --env staging && VERIFY_URL=https://sayit-hono-staging.workers.dev/version DEPLOY_RETRY_HINT='npx wrangler deploy --env staging' bun run verify:deploy
scripts.dev:staging: bun run build:views && wrangler dev --remote --env staging
scripts.preview:assets: bun run build:assets && python3 -m http.server 4173 -d www
